## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, publishing progress, and upcoming changes.](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content volume and refresh efforts are on track, exceeding typical output by \~25%](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [New reporting dashboard coming by Tuesday, including LLM traffic data](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [Team transitioning: Nico's last day; new CMs being onboarded](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Meeting time shifting to Fridays or Mondays (TBD) to accommodate team schedules](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Publishing

  - [Currently above typical output by \~25%, including refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Publishing occasionally faces Webflow login issues when multiple users active](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Exploring automation options to streamline publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [New topics and refresh content pipeline set for next 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [New dashboard coming Tuesday, will include:](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
      - [LLM traffic data](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [Separation of new vs. refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
      - [Week-over-week and month-over-month comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Integrating Profound AI visibility tool data](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
      - [Adding schema (FAQ, speakable, product) to improve AI platform visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Jakub to be added to Profound for direct access](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Team Changes and Workflow

  - [Nico's last day; new Content Managers (CMs) being onboarded](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Experienced CMs may supplement during transition](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Tanmay to complete article reviews by Monday for timely publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Weekly meeting time potentially moving to Friday 8:30 AM PT or Monday 10 AM PT](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)

### Additional Projects

  - [Jakub to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Updated Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [Programmatic SEO recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [Suggestions for combining/pruning existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to deliver new reporting dashboard by Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [Tanmay to add Jakub to Profound AI visibility tool](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Team to finalize new weekly meeting time (Friday vs. Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Jakub to provide programmatic SEO recommendations and article pruning suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Explore automation options for Webflow publishing to reduce conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/ps1MH38D87KQB-5oEo-RUGFzHHuECzPX?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
